content.thinking:
These are pre-existing test errors - the test file references a `status: 'succeeded'` which doesn't exist in the Transactions collection schema (which only has `pending`, `completed`, `failed`, `refunded`). This is a pre-existing issue in the test file, not something I introduced.

Also, the test creates transactions with fields like `product`, `provider`, `providerTransactionId` — but the actual Transactions collection doesn't have those fields (it has `tranzilaTransactionId`, `tranzilaOrderId`, `pricingPlan`, `user`, etc.). This test was clearly written for a different (probably older) schema.

These are pre-existing issues in the test file, not caused by my conflict resolution. 

The Transactions.ts file I resolved looks fine - those test errors existed before my changes. Since this is a merge conflict resolution task, not a full test cleanup, I should report what I've resolved and note that these pre-existing test issues aren't related to my work.
